code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if string.len(cur) > 0
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(cur) > 0
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while j < n
    if j != idx
      match xs.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        out = list.push(out, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  out
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()

mut nums = parse_line(line1)

let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let total = nums.len()
mut take = k
if take > total
  take = total
end

mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  mut max_idx = 0
  mut max_val = 0
  match nums.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    max_val = v
  when None
    ()
  end
  mut j = 1
  let m = nums.len()
  while j < m
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if v > max_val
        max_val = v
        max_idx = j
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if i == 0
    result = "#{max_val}"
  else
    result = "#{result} #{max_val}"
  end
  nums = remove_at(nums, max_idx)
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
